languages.text: "Не знаю. Но он был в зоне поражения, когда произошел взрыв. Вероятно, атака была направлена на него".

traits.locale_text: "Не знаю. Но он был в зоне поражения, когда произошел взрыв. Вероятно, атака была направлена на него".
traits.speaker: MB_Jokasta

languages.text: "I don't know. But he was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."
languages.original_text: "Не знаю. Но он был в зоне поражения, когда произошел взрыв. Вероятно, атака была направлена на него".

traits.locale_text: "I don't. But he was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."
"I don't. But he was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."
"I don't. But he was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."

languages.text: 「私は知らない。でも、爆発が起こった時には、彼は爆発の範囲内にいた。この攻撃は彼を標的にしたかったのだろう」
languages.original_text: "I don't know. But he was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."

traits.locale_text: 「私は知らない。でも、爆発が起こった時には、彼は爆発の範囲内にいた。この攻撃は彼を標的にしたかったのだろう。」

languages.text: "Bilmiyorum. Fakat patlama olduğunda patlama alanındaydı. Saldırı muhtemelen onu hedef alıyordu."
languages.original_text: "I don't know. But he was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."

traits.locale_text: "Bilmiyorum. Fakat patlama olduğunda patlama alanındaydı. Saldırı muhtemelen onu hedef alıyordu."

languages.text: «No lo sé, pero estaba en el radio de la explosión. Es probable que el ataque estuviera dirigido a él».
languages.original_text: "I don't know. But he was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."

traits.locale_text: «No lo sé, pero estaba en el radio de la explosión. Es probable que el ataque estuviera dirigido a él».

languages.text: “我不知道。但爆炸发生时他就在爆炸区内。这次袭击很可能是冲着他来的。”
languages.original_text: "I don't know. But he was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."

traits.locale_text: “我不知道。但爆炸发生时他就在爆炸区内。这次袭击很可能是冲着他来的。”

languages.text: « Je ne sais pas, mais il se trouvait dans la zone d'impact de la grenade quand elle a explosé. Je pense que l'attaque le visait. »
languages.original_text: "I don't know. But he was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne sais pas, mais il se trouvait dans la zone d'impact de la grenade quand elle a explosé. Je pense que l'attaque le visait. »

languages.text: "Ich weiß nicht. Aber er stand mitten in der Explosionszone. Der Anschlag galt wahrscheinlich ihm."
languages.original_text: "I don't know. But he was in the blast zone when the explosion happened. The attack was probably aimed at him."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß nicht. Aber er stand mitten in der Explosionszone. Der Anschlag galt wahrscheinlich ihm."
